name: ad-intel
description: Ad performance monitor that analyzes Spend vs CTR and reports anomalies for growth operations.
capability_summary: Monitors ad performance using gw bridge inputs, flags spend/CTR anomalies, and outputs deterministic JSON alerts for the marketing strategist.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Path to JSON file containing campaign records with spend and ctr fields.

parameters.name: spend_threshold_pct
parameters.description: Percent increase threshold for spend anomaly detection (default 35).

parameters.name: ctr_threshold_pct
parameters.description: Percent decrease threshold for ctr anomaly detection (default 20).

parameters.name: bridge_command
parameters.description: Optional gw bridge shell command that returns JSON records.
